text.title: Research Repo Naming — Output Contract
text.summary: Folder layout, manifest schema, and the participant-id map. Synthesis agents (LLM tagger, RAG store) consume the manifest, not the raw files.

field.name: folder_tree
field.must_contain: recruit/, run/, tag/, synth/, archive/, participants/

field.name: participant_map
field.access: restricted (do not commit to public repos; symlink from secret store)

forbidden.pattern: filename contains capital letters, spaces, or non-ascii characters
filename contains the participant's real name, email, phone, or employer
manifest.json missing OR last_generated > 7 days ago
participants/map.json committed to a public repo OR to git history of the same repo
file in `synth/` with no source files cited in its frontmatter

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add a new study-type to the enum requires version bump of manifest schema; do not silently expand.
Renumber participants is forbidden after first publication of synthesis; allocate new P### codes for new participants.
Rename a file requires both the file rename and a manifest rebuild; never one without the other.

section.title: Canonical folder tree
section.code: research/ ├── recruit/ -- screeners, outreach, scheduling ├── run/ -- raw artefacts: transcripts, audio, video, exports ├── tag/ -- per-artefact tagged versions (frontmatter + tags) ├── synth/ -- synthesis outputs (themes, jobs, jtbd statements, reports) ├── archive/ -- closed studies, read-only ├── participants/ │ └── map.json -- P### → name_hash + private metadata (NOT committed) ├── manifest.json -- generated, RAG-readable index └── README.md

list.item: `scripts/build-manifest.py` produced manifest within the last 7 days
No filename contains real names or PII
Every synth/ file cites its source artefacts in frontmatter
participants/map.json is excluded from public commits (.gitignore + signed verification)
